name: Sharon Rainsworth
nativeName: シャロン・レインズワース
description: __Height:__ 157 cm (5'2") The Lady of the Rainsworth household. Sharon is a member of Pandora and looks like a thirteen year old girl, although she is chronologically 23 years old. Her appearance does not change from her first meeting with Oz to after he came out of the Abyss because she has a legal contract with a chain, the black unicorn Eques. Sharon and Break have a close relationship. It is she who discovers Break after he was found in front of the Rainsworth household's gate to the abyss.

name: Togo Shiba
description: Old friend of [Kunishige Rokuhira](https://anilist.co/character/314803), a former member of the Kamunabi, and a Seitei War veteran.

name: Uzuki Shimamura
description: **Height:** 159 cm **Hometown:** Tokyo, Japan An extraordinarily ordinary girl, Uzuki is always positive and bright, showing dedication towards being an idol. Her ordinary personality and her smile are seen as her defining traits. name: Amelia Irving
nativeName: アメリア・アーヴィング
description: Amelia is an innocent, but also clumsy and selfish girl. She expresses her affection directly and tends to go out of control. She has a personality that makes it difficult for her to speak her mind, making her a "tsundere". She is a transfer student from the United States.

name: Hitomi Takano
description: To the non-observant eye, Hitomi appears to be a big, scary, and no-nonsense girl feared by both the young and the old. In actuality, she is a sweet and shy girl that lives a troubled life due to the misunderstandings caused by her scary look. After transferring to a new school, she meets [Yuu Usami](https://anilist.co/character/141494/Yuu-Usami), who slowly but steadily changes the way she looks at herself.

name: Lyne Mei
description: Lyne Mei is the secondary female character of Plunderer. She is a sergeant, who protects Hoemmh which is located at the side of a hill. Amiable to a fault, Lyne is always eager to help others, and boosting her count is not the sole motivator. She is genuinely a good person, if not a little daft because of her sweet nature. name: Manami Okuda
description: She is a student in class 3-E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School, taught by Korosensei. Okuda is shy and rather introverted. She admits that she isn't really good with surprise attacks and expressing things in language. She excels in chemistry and capable of making poisons for assassinations.

name: Mikhail
description: Yuliy’s older brother. He was born in a rural village known as the dog-ville and lived peacefully with Yuliy and their mother.

name: Mitsuki Kouyama
description: A girl who wants to become a singer. It is her dream, and also her promise with Eichi-kun, her lost love. Tragically, she suffers from throat cancer... she is then greeted by two shinigami, Meroko and Takuto. Together they embark on a journey to make her singing dreams come true and defeat all odds of her cancer. Mitsuki will lose love and find new love. Throughout this journey her heart and voice will keep on singing.
mediaTitles: Full Moon wo Sagashite: Kawaii Kawaii Daibouken

name: Nice Holystone
nativeName: ニース・ホーリーストーン
description: Nice Holystone is a bomb enthusiast and the girlfriend of Jacuzzi Splot. She co-leads Jacuzzi's Gang. Nice's skin is marred by scars (on the right side of her face and across her arms) thanks to an accident in her youth. She covers her empty right eye socket with an eye patch, and wears glasses due to the damage incurred to her left eye. name: Satou no Oba
description: A relative of Satou who had taken full custody of her after her parents died many years ago. She is basically the one responsible for making Satou the deranged psychopath that she is today. (Source: Wikipedia, edited)

name: Touma Kikuchi
description: __Height:__ 178.5 cm (5'10") Touma is a boy in Futaba's year, making his first appearance in Chapter 12. He initially has a very bad impression of Futaba, during which she trips and ends up accidentally groping him. However, he eventually softens up to her when he notices how remorseful she feels about the incident.
